itemType: Duration Augment - Increases the duration of the Lingering Grenade by 50%
Spawning Augment - Spawns additional Grenades on each bounce
MIRV Payload - Spawns 4 MIRV Grenades on exploding
Divider Payload - Spawns a second Grenade while midflight
Spring Payload - Bounces in place, exploding 3 additional times
Artillery Payload - Fires bullets around the Grenade, Dealing 0 damage/s
Singularity Payload - Spawns a Singularity that pulls in nearby enemies
Lingering Payload - Spawns 4 rotating beams dealing 0 incendiary damage/s
Damage Amp Payload - Damage Taken by impacted target is increased by +15% for 10s
Tightly Packed Augment - Increases amount of MIRV Grenades spawned by +2
Rubberized Augment - MIRV Grenades bounce up to 5 times before exploding
Micro Mirv Augment - MIRV Grenades each spawn 3 Micro MIRVs when they explode
Spring Augment - MIRV Grenades bounce in place 3 times, exploding on each bounce
Long Division Augment - Spawn another additional Grenade while midflight
Splinter Augment - Launches the second spawned Grenade toward an enemy
Pulling Augment - Each Grenade spawns a Singularity
Repeater Augment - Spawns additional Grenades downwards while midflight
Spring Augment - Each Grenade bounces in place, exploding 3 extra times
Tightly Coiled - Grenade bounces in place, exploding an additional +3 times
Apex Augment - Each Grenade also explodes at the apex of each bounce
Compounding Augment - With every bounce Damage increases by +25% and Damage Radius by +13%
Bouncer Augment - Each Grenade bounces twards nearby enemies
Duration Augment - Increases the Duration of the Artillery Grenade by +50%
Ricochet Augment - Artillery Projectiles will bounce off of enemies, and Ricochet towards another nearby enemy
Missles Augment - Fires Micro-Missiles that home in on nearby enemies, each dealing 2974 Damage
Maglock Augment - Homes in on nearby enemies
Mortar Augment - Fires Mortars toward enemy positions, each dealing 3569 Damage
Prolonged Augment - Increases the duration of the Singularity Grenade by 50%
Gnawing Augment - Deals 2379 Damage/s for the Duration of the Singularity
Collapsing Augment - The Singularity pulls in enemies more rapidly, and with increased Force withen a large Radius
Repulsor Augment - Upon Exploding, pushes enemies away from the singularity
Duration Augment - Increases the Duration of the Lingering Grenade by 50%
Pulsing Augment - Radiates Elemental Pulses from the Grenade each Pulse dealing 1190 Damage
Splat Pack Augment - Launches 3 Projectiles that each spawn an Elemental Puddle on landing
Fracture Augment - Spawns 3 Elemental Pillars in the direction the Grenade was thrown, each dealing 3867 damage
Alchemic Augment - Grenade Status Effect Chance +300%
Bouncing Blade Augment - Ricochets additional knives toward nearby enemies, dealing 4461 Damage
Supressor Augment - Damage Delt by impacted target is reduced by -25% for 10s
Penetrator Augment - Damge to the impacted target has a 30% Chance to be a Critical Hit for 5s
Overflow - Maximum Grenade Charge is increased by +1
Express - Grenade cooldown Duration is reduced by -12%
Explosive - Grenade Damage is increased by 13%
Expansive - Grenade Damage Radius is increased by +25%
Hazardous - Grenade Status Effect Chance is increased by +10% and Greande Status Effect Damage is increased by +20%
Exacting - Grenade has a 15% Chance to deal Critical Damage
Nuke - Grenade Damage is Increased by 19% Grenade Damage Radius is increased by 38%, and Grenade Cooldown Duration is increased by +25%
Concussive - Knockback Force is increased by +50%
Bloodthirsty - Grenade Lifesteal is increased by 10%
Merciless - Grenade Critical Damage is increased by +50%
Lethal - Grenade Damage is increased by 25%, and Grenade Projectile Speed is reduced by -50%
Wideload - Damage Radius is increased by 38%, Homing Turn Rate reduced by -33%
